dialog.stepLabel: Phoebe: "What do you make of the clues, {PlayerName}?..."

items.speaker: Phoebe
items.text: What do you make of the clues, {PlayerName}?

items.speaker: {PlayerName}
items.text: Finding that Gondola might be a good start.

items.speaker: Phoebe
items.text: Good idea. The sailor may have vanished, but if his Gondola is still here we may be able to find some clues.
